summary: Critical testing of Khaiju financial system. VPS deployment has OUTDATED FRONTEND BUILD causing black screen after login. Backend APIs work but frontend calls non-existent endpoints.

ui_bugs.issue: BLACK SCREEN after login due to JavaScript TypeError: o.map is not a function
Cannot navigate to any tab - sidebar not visible due to crash

integration_issues.issue: Frontend calls /api/reports/monthly-series but backend only has /api/reports
Frontend passes limit=[object Object] causing 502 - malformed query parameter

action_items: CRITICAL: Rebuild and redeploy frontend to VPS - current deployed build is outdated and doesn't match source code
Verify adapters.js changes are in the deployed build (should call /api/reports not /api/reports/monthly-series)
Check why recentTransactions adapter passes object instead of number for limit parameter
critical_code_review_comments: VPS deployed frontend build is OUTDATED - source code has correct adapters.js but deployed JS bundle calls wrong endpoints
Backend /api/reports and /api/categories return 502 when authenticated - possible Prisma/DB connection issue on VPS
Frontend adapters.js line 36-38: recentTransactions passes filters object but backend expects limit as number
seed_data_creation: Created test users via registration endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: VPS has outdated frontend build. After main agent rebuilds and redeploys, retest all navigation tabs. Backend /api/auth, /api/kpis, /api/transactions work. /api/reports and /api/categories return 502.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: VPS frontend build is outdated - deployed JS bundle calls endpoints that don't exist (/api/reports/monthly-series, /api/goals, /api/budget, /api/categories/stats) while source code adapters.js has correct endpoints
reproduction_steps: 3. After successful auth, page shows black screen
4. Console shows TypeError: o.map is not a function
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Rebuild frontend with 'yarn build' and redeploy to VPS. Ensure the new build includes the corrected adapters.js
